member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService.Init
member.summary: Initialize telemetry service data structures. To be invoked during ServiceStore initialization inside the kernel.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService.AddOrUpdateCurrentLoggerEnricher(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Update the current thread logger enricher, if previously set. If no enricher was set, create it.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService.RemoveCurrentLoggerEnricher(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Remove the current thread logger enricher.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService.RemoveCurrentLoggerEnricherItem(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String)
member.summary: Remove the current thread logger enricher.
member.param: The item to be removed from the enriching database.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService.CreateInstanceContextLogger(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.TelemetryLogLevel,System.String)
member.param: the global logger for this instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService.SetGlobalLogLevel(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.TelemetryLogLevel)
member.summary: Set the global log level for the whole TP session.
member.param: The global log level to set.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService.ResolveLogLevelParameter(System.String)
member.summary: Resolve the loglevel from string to MIT logging LogLevel enum.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.ITelemetryService.CreateTelemetryHandler``1(Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.TelemetryLogLevel)
member.summary: Create a new telemetry handler for type T.
member.typeparam: The type to be used for all telemetries in this object.
member.param: The log level for all telemetries in this object.

member.name: P:Prime.TelemetryService.PrimeLoggerEnricher.DictionaryData
member.summary: Gets the dictionary data of the enricher.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.InstanceTelemetryProvider.#ctor(Prime.TelemetryService.InstanceTelemetryProvider.LoggerData)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.InstanceTelemetryProvider.LoggerData.#ctor(MPE.MIT.Logging.Context.IContextLogger,Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.TelemetryLogLevel)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The actual logger for this instance.
The instance telemetry log level parameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TelemetryService.InstanceTelemetryProvider.LoggerData.Logger
member.summary: Gets the actual logger for this instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TelemetryService.InstanceTelemetryProvider.LoggerData.InstanceLogLevel
member.summary: Gets the instance telemetry log level parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryHandler`1.#ctor(Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.TelemetryLogLevel)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The log level for all telemetries in this object.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryHandler`1.LogPerformanceScope(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Returns a performance scope object to be used within a using block. If method name is not provided, the compiler will provide the calling method name. Additional parameters can be provided as a func of Dictionary. For performance, always use a static literals for this API.
member.param: Additional parameters to be added to the telemetry.
The method name to be recorded inside this object.
member.returns: IDisposable object that measure the block performance.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryHandler`1.LogUsage(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Log usage telemetry. If method name is not provided, the compiler will provide the calling method name. Additional parameters can be provided as a func of Dictionary. For performance, always use a static literals for this API.
member.param: Additional parameters to be added to the telemetry.
The method name to be recorded inside this object.

member.name: T:Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver
member.summary: Responsible for extracting the telemetry parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.ConvertTelemetryLevel(System.String)
member.summary: Convert telemetry level parameter string to enum.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.ConvertTelemetryLevel(Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.TelemetryLogLevel)
member.summary: Convert a TelemetryLevel enum to MIT logLevel. Defaults to None.

member.name: M:Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryService.GetEffectiveTelemetryLevel(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,Prime.TelemetryService.TelemetryLogLevelResolver.TelemetryLogLevel)
member.summary: Get the effective log level, compares between argument and shared storage value.
